sourceExpression.description: How a value is extracted from a fetched source document. Either a bare jq string, or an object declaring exactly one of jq / jsonPointer plus optional partialUpdate and required.

oneOf.description: Shorthand for a required jq expression.

jq.description: jackson-jq program evaluated against the fetched document.

jsonPointer.description: RFC 6901 JSON Pointer resolved against the fetched document (alternative to jq).

partialUpdate.description: Array/value operation applied in partial-update mode (e.g. set, add, add-distinct, remove, removeregex, inc).

required.description: When true (default), a missing value aborts mapping of the document.

sourcingMap.description: Per-datasource value extraction. Keys are datasource names; 'default' and '*' act as fallbacks.

block_mask.description: Solr parent block mask used as the 'which' filter in {!parent} queries on this subdocument type.

subdocumentType.description: Equal to the name of another document type (a property under the root of this schema with the documentSchema definition).

destinationField.description: Physical field name that is stored in the search engine for this field.

sourcing.description: Indexer-side leaf value extraction, keyed by datasource. Ignored by the query side.

primaryKey.description: Indexer-side subdocument child-id extraction, keyed by datasource. Only valid on subdocument fields.

partialUpdate.description: Indexer-side subdocument array operation, keyed by datasource. Only valid on subdocument fields.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URI for editor validation of mapping documents.

root.description: Mapping definition for the root search document. Fields declared here describe values that live directly on the top-level indexed document.

additionalProperties.description: Mapping definition for a named subdocument type. Each additional top-level property name can be referenced by subdocument fields through subdocumentType.
